restaurants.name: Revel
restaurants.whyFun: Chef Rachel Yang's creative Korean comfort food with a massive open kitchen. Perfect for sharing and the energy is always buzzing.

restaurants.name: The Ballard Cut
restaurants.whyFun: Farm-to-table steakhouse with an incredible Japanese whiskey selection. Upscale but approachable, great for a celebratory night.

restaurants.name: Grappa
restaurants.whyFun: Upper Queen Anne's hidden gem with fresh handmade pasta and an extensive grappa and wine list. Intimate and perfect for date night.
